skill.name: fal-upscale
skill.description: Upscale and enhance image and video resolution using AI
skill.summary: AI-powered image and video upscaling using fal.ai
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 4 patterns that are all false positives. The 2 URL findings are documentation metadata links in frontmatter and reference section. The 2 weak crypto findings are text descriptions, not actual cryptographic code. No executable code present in SKILL.md - pure documentation file.

content.user_title: Upscale images and videos with AI
content.value_statement: Low-resolution media limits professional use. This skill enhances image and video quality using fal.ai's AI upscaling models.
actual_capabilities: Upscale low-resolution images to higher resolutions using AI models
Enhance video quality with intelligent frame improvement
Process multiple image formats for upscaling workflows
Integrate fal.ai upscaling APIs into Claude workflows
Provide upscaling recommendations based on source media
limitations: Requires network access to fal.ai external API services
API usage may incur costs based on fal.ai pricing tiers
Cannot process media files without internet connectivity
Output quality depends on source media condition

use_cases.title: Photo restoration
use_cases.description: Enhance old or low-quality photos to modern resolution standards for archival or printing purposes

use_cases.title: Video content enhancement
use_cases.description: Upscale legacy video content to HD or 4K resolution for streaming platforms

use_cases.title: Design asset preparation
use_cases.description: Prepare small images for large-format displays by intelligently increasing resolution

prompt_templates.title: Basic image upscaling
prompt_templates.prompt: Upscale this image to 4x resolution while preserving details and minimizing artifacts.

prompt_templates.title: Batch image enhancement
prompt_templates.prompt: Process these 10 product photos and upscale each to 2048x2048 pixels for our e-commerce catalog.

prompt_templates.title: Video resolution boost
prompt_templates.prompt: Enhance this 480p video clip to 1080p using AI upscaling suitable for YouTube upload.

prompt_templates.title: Quality comparison analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Upscale this image using different AI models and provide a comparison so I can select the best result.

output_examples.output: Enhanced 1920x1920 pixel logo with crisp edges and preserved details
Restored high-resolution version with improved clarity and reduced noise

best_practices: Always review upscaled results before using in production workflows
Start with 2x upscaling before attempting higher magnifications for best quality
Keep original files as backup before applying AI enhancement
anti_patterns: Do not rely on upscaling to fix severely damaged or corrupted images
Avoid upscaling text-heavy images as AI may distort character shapes
Do not use AI upscaling when authentic original resolution is required for verification

faq.question: What image formats does fal-upscale support?
faq.answer: The skill supports common formats including JPEG, PNG, WebP, and GIF. RAW formats may require conversion first.

faq.question: How much does it cost to use fal.ai upscaling?
faq.answer: Costs depend on fal.ai's current pricing model. Check their official documentation for per-image or subscription rates.

faq.question: Can this skill upscale videos in real-time?
faq.answer: No, upscaling is processed batch-style through the API. Real-time video enhancement requires dedicated hardware solutions.

faq.question: What is the maximum resolution this skill can output?
faq.answer: Maximum output depends on fal.ai model limits, typically up to 4K for most use cases.

faq.question: Does the upscaled image contain watermarks?
faq.answer: No, fal.ai upscaling does not add watermarks to output images. You retain full rights to enhanced content.

faq.question: Can I use this skill offline?
faq.answer: No, the skill requires network connectivity to access fal.ai's API services for AI processing.
